change: AI Clone (PR #8822): reply as yourself via the Telethon user-account plugin. The new mode authenticates as the user's PERSONAL Telegram account (via a session string generated by Telethon and stored in macOS Keychain), so AI replies appear to come from the user, not from a separate bot. Includes a 'Reply as me' section in the connect sheet with a one-time ToS acknowledgement, plan §8 rate-limit (30 sends/hour) + FLOOD_WAIT detection + daily-sent counter surfaced as a 'Sent X/30 this hour' badge with a warning when approaching the cap, and a 30s periodic /status poll so the badge stays current. The bot and user-account plugins run side-by-side; the user picks which mode is active per account.
